text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Taiki Shuttle asks me to meet her in the
central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. I thought ya wouldn't show up, Trainer. Or should I say—outlaw!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Your crimes stop today, ya hear? I hope you're
ready to get a belly full of lead!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You've been workin' up a storm lately, but I
haven't seen one bit of relaxing!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna burn up all the midnight oil with so
much overtime! All work and no play is no laughin'
matter!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So you're spendin' the day with me and giving
that body and mind of yours some rest!
choice_data_list: My workload has been a little heavy lately...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Right? Here's the deal. I'm a gunslinger, and
you're part of a band of outlaws!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Time to duel! Let's see who's the fastest gun in
Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ready to square off? Soon as the bell rings, whip out your shooter and... bang!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My bullets blast right through evil, bringing peace
back to the Wild West!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All righty—let's do this! Wait for it... Wait for it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding-dong, bing-bong...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, that was a close one! And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw! Victory is mine!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... There's nothin' slow about your shot,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But you're too much of a greenhorn to match my quick draw!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. Know what happens if ya get hit?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It means you're dead and gone! Night night! So
cut it out with the overtime and get to sleepin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but ya won't be down-and-out forever! Once
you're feelin' better, get on back here. I'll be
lonely without ya around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki forces me to take a break. Thanks to her act
of kindness, I'm able to get some much-needed
rest.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hm... You're a tough outlaw, ain't ya?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But ya slipped up. Ya shoot, you're guilty!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
See, I'm the sheriff in these parts. I gotta book ya
now for shootin' somebody. And your punishment
is...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're goin' straight to the hoosegow! Time to
take a load off!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It means I want ya to kick your feet up! It's not
your fault—your weary bones are the culprit!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, off to the hoosegow with ya! And don't ya
make a peep, or you're gettin' solitary!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a hundred percent sure what she's saying,
but it seems I've been given the day off to relax.
